headline: Max still top, while Norway and Uruguay cop the rough end of it
text: A tidy little night for Max, who still sits top overall with 19 points, even if Norway were thumped 4-1 by France and only Saudi Arabia scraped a 0-0 with Cape Verde. Grandad had the best of it as Spain beat Uruguay 1-0, keeping him right in the title scrap on 16. Carolina also picked up useful points through France. At the other end, Sara took the biggest wobble after Uruguay’s defeat, while Vicki’s Cape Verde draw did little to shift the mood. Bottom overall remains Sofia on 7 points, with Grandad still the best placed and Max leading the lot.
